ddls:
CREATE TABLE "validators" (
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validator */,
  "validator_address" TEXT /* Unique address of the validator */,
  "validator_name" TEXT /* Name of the validator */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the validator */,
  "delegation" REAL /* Total delegation amount of the validator */,
  "bond" REAL /* Bond amount of the validator */,
  "power" REAL /* Power of the validator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the validator (active/inactive) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the validator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the validator */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the validator joined the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., delegator, validator, admin) */,
  "wallet_address" TEXT /* Wallet address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delegations" (
  "delegation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delegation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the delegation */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator being delegated to */,
  "delegation_amount" REAL /* Amount of stake being delegated */,
  "delegation_date" TEXT /* Date the delegation was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the delegation (e.g., active, pending, revoked) */,
  "reward_rate" REAL /* Reward rate for the delegation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delegation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delegations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES validators ("validator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delegations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delegation_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delegation event */,
  "delegation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the delegation associated with the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., delegation, undelegation) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the event */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Blockchain transaction hash */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "undelegations" (
  "undelegation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each undelegation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the undelegation */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator being undelegated from */,
  "undelegation_amount" REAL /* Amount of stake being undelegated */,
  "undelegation_date" TEXT /* Date the undelegation was made */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the undelegation process is completed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for undelegation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("undelegation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_undelegations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES validators ("validator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_undelegations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validator_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator associated with the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., delegation rate, block production rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validator_metrics_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES validators ("validator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_delegation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delegation history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the delegation history */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator associated with the delegation history */,
  "delegation_amount" REAL /* Amount of stake delegated */,
  "delegation_date" TEXT /* Date the delegation was made */,
  "undelegation_date" TEXT /* Date the delegation was undelegated (if applicable) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the delegation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_delegation_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_delegation_history_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES validators ("validator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validator_delegation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delegation history entry */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator associated with the delegation history */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the delegation history */,
  "delegation_amount" REAL /* Amount of stake delegated */,
  "delegation_date" TEXT /* Date the delegation was made */,
  "undelegation_date" TEXT /* Date the delegation was undelegated (if applicable) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the delegation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validator_delegation_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validator_delegation_history_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES validators ("validator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delegate_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user earning the reward */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator associated with the reward */,
  "reward_amount" REAL /* Amount of the reward */,
  "reward_date" TEXT /* Date the reward was earned */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., block reward, transaction fee) */,
  "claimed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reward has been claimed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delegate_rewards_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES validators ("validator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delegate_rewards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validator_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator earning the reward */,
  "reward_amount" REAL /* Amount of the reward */,
  "reward_date" TEXT /* Date the reward was earned */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., block reward, commission) */,
  "claimed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reward has been claimed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validator_rewards_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES validators ("validator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "self_delegations" (
  "self_delegation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each self-delegation */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator making the self-delegation */,
  "self_delegation_amount" REAL /* Amount of stake self-delegated */,
  "self_delegation_date" TEXT /* Date the self-delegation was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the self-delegation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("self_delegation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_self_delegations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES validators ("validator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validator_commissions" (
  "commission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commission rate */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator setting the commission rate */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate (as a percentage) */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date the commission rate was set */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the commission rate becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validator_commissions_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES validators ("validator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the network parameter */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the network parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)
